title: Employee Onboarding Checklist
summary: Convert a basic onboarding checklist into an APD graph that coordinates account setup, equipment provisioning, and confirmation.
entry_conditions: A new employee onboarding request has been approved.

employee_name.description: Name of the employee being onboarded.

entities.name: onboarding-checklist.bpmn
entities.description: Original BPMN diagram used as the source for conversion.

nodes.name: Create core accounts
nodes.instruction: Create the employee's email, chat, and HR system accounts using the approved onboarding request.
completion_checks: Core accounts exist for the new employee.

recovery.instructions: Pause for review if account data conflicts across systems or an account already exists unexpectedly.

nodes.name: Prepare equipment
nodes.instruction: Reserve and configure the employee laptop and required accessories.
completion_checks: Assigned equipment is ready for handoff.

recovery.instructions: If the preferred hardware is unavailable, reserve the standard backup device and record the exception for follow-up.

risk.reason: Provisioning changes asset assignment but can be corrected.

nodes.name: Confirm onboarding packet
nodes.reason: HR confirms that all onboarding steps are complete before notifying the new employee.

nodes.name: Send readiness confirmation
nodes.instruction: Send the onboarding readiness confirmation to the employee and hiring manager.
completion_checks: The readiness confirmation has been sent.

recovery.instructions: Do not send the confirmation until the recipients, equipment status, and start date are verified.

risk.reason: Sending the confirmation affects external communication timing.

provenance.observed_vs_inferred_summary: This APD was converted from a BPMN onboarding checklist and then normalized into APD node semantics.
